claims.claim: Conor McGregor is at a disadvantage fighting five rounds instead of three after a long layoff.
claims.quote: I would have liked this to be a three rounder for him coming back and not a five rounder.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor's five-year layoff makes it difficult for him to compete at a high level.
claims.quote: Five years, bro. Like the And I I will say something about this fight, bro. I don't feel like Conor McGregor is getting that buzz, bro.

claims.claim: Max Holloway's tactical approach of circling and managing rhythm is the correct strategy to handle Conor McGregor's power.
claims.quote: if there's one thing that he did very well when he first fought Ili before he got knocked out is he circled. He circled. He played the game until he started kind of feeling his rhythm.

claims.claim: Max Holloway is too smart to engage in a slugfest with Conor McGregor.
claims.quote: But if he does go in there and just starts to slug it off and everybody says the you know that that left that left hand is dangerous. You know it could be it for him. But I just feel like Connor's just a I'm sorry. I'm just feel like Max is just a little too smart for that.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor will need a miracle to win due to the length of his layoff and the intensity of USADA/drug testing.
claims.quote: And he's the most tested guy in the UFC right now. Like, bro, he's going to need a [ __ ] miracle and a half.

claims.claim: Max Holloway's movement and circling were effective in his first fight against Ilia Topuria before he was knocked out.
claims.quote: if there's one thing that he did very well when he first fought Ili before he got knocked out is he circled. He circled. He played the game until he started kind of feeling his rhythm.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor has been inactive for five years.
claims.quote: we haven't seen Conor McGregor in five years

claims.claim: Conor McGregor is the most tested fighter in the UFC right now.
claims.quote: he's the most tested guy in the UFC right now.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor is not lazy in the training room and is willing to do the work.
claims.quote: I don't think anyone's ever come out and said that he's lazy in the training room. He's willing to do the work

claims.claim: Patty Pimblett's recent fight against Justin Gaethje serves as a motivation and energy booster for him.
claims.quote: the fact that Justin Gai just became champion and they had that war between him and Patty Pimlet, bro. It's also an energy booster, a motivation for him.

claims.claim: Benoit Saint Denis is on a four-fight winning streak with all finishes occurring before the third round.
claims.quote: He's coming off of four wins. Four wins in a row. All four finishes. None of them getting out of the second round.

claims.claim: Benoit Saint Denis forces opponents into high-pressure situations immediately, similar to the style of the earlier Justin Gaethje.
claims.quote: it is his ability to put you in danger, under pressure in in he brings you into the fire immediately. Same thing Justin Gatechi does.

claims.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has the ability to grapple, wrestle, and strike at a high level.
claims.quote: This guy can strike. This guy can grapple. Not just grapple. He can wrestle as well.

claims.claim: Benoit Saint Denis is currently on a four-fight winning streak with all finishes occurring in the first or second round.
claims.quote: He's coming off of four wins. Four wins in a row. All four finishes. None of them getting out of the second round.

claims.claim: Cory Sandhagen is highly skilled in striking, wrestling, and submissions.
claims.quote: Cory's got knees, he's got elbows, he's got wrestling, he's got submissions.

claims.claim: Mario Bautista has improved his confidence and approach to the game since his first fight against Cory Sandhagen.
claims.quote: I think uh Mario Batista has improved greatly greatly with his confidence with the way that he he approaches the game

claims.claim: Terrence McKinney has only reached the third round one time in his professional career.
claims.quote: Terrence McKinnon has seen the third round one time in his career.

claims.claim: Terrence McKinney is dangerous in the first three minutes of a fight.
claims.quote: Everybody knows for the first three minutes of a fight. Yeah. If you ain't on your P's and Q's, Ter Terence McKenna gonna put it on you.

claims.claim: Bobby Green is sharper and smarter on his feet than Terrence McKinney.
claims.quote: I feel like he's just he he's just he's just sharper and smarter on his feet. better IQ.

claims.claim: Terrence McKinney has only seen the third round one time in his professional career.
claims.quote: Terrence McKinnon has seen the third round one time in his career.

claims.claim: If the fight goes past the first round, the odds shift significantly in favor of Bobby Green.
claims.quote: If it gets out of the first round, the odds significantly, I think, flip to where King Green now becomes a favorite if it gets out of the first round.

claims.claim: Terrence McKinney possesses the size and athleticism to eventually compete as a welterweight.
claims.quote: He's going to end up being a welterweight.

claims.claim: Robert Whittaker retains the speed and movement necessary to be successful in the light heavyweight division.
claims.quote: His speed, bro. I think light heavyweight is pretty open to be quite frank with you. And I feel like Robert Whitaker has that style, bro.

claims.claim: Gable Steveson is the biggest favorite in UFC history for a debut fight.
claims.quote: I believe from what I from what I saw from the stats, Gable Seas is the biggest favorite in the history of the UFC.

claims.claim: Olympic wrestling skills do not always translate to MMA due to the presence of the cage for defensive support.
claims.quote: It's very different when you're in a in a fight when there's a cage to help guys stay up.

claims.claim: Gable Steveson needs to improve his composure and keep his hands up to succeed in the UFC.
claims.quote: I think the biggest thing I hope Gable just keeps his composure, keeps his hands up

claims.claim: Gable Steveson has not yet proven himself as a mixed martial artist due to his limited experience.
claims.quote: you with only what three or four fights, you really still don't know yourself yet as a mixed martial artist.

claims.claim: The UFC environment and pressure can negatively impact a fighter's performance compared to other organizations.
claims.quote: once you find the UFC, and you see that stage and that light and these celebrities there, it changes, bro.

claims.claim: Gable Steveson needs to develop his skills further before facing top-five competition.
claims.quote: I would like to see him at least fight six fights to before he gets maybe into the top 10

claims.claim: Cody Garbrandt is facing a significant test to prove he can still compete at a high level.
claims.quote: This is a big test for Cody. I want to see if Cody is still able to to to do this at the high level

claims.claim: Adrien Yanez has moved away from the boxing-heavy style he displayed earlier in his career.
claims.quote: I feel like now he's kind of I feel like he's kind of changed his style a little bit. I would like to really still see him get back to that boxing.

claims.claim: Miranda Maverick is a high-level opponent for Tracy Cortez.
claims.quote: she ain't no slouch.

claims.claim: Adrien Yanez has moved away from the boxing-heavy style he displayed earlier in his career.
claims.quote: I feel like he's kind of changed his style a little bit. I would like to really still see him get back to that boxing.

claims.claim: Cody Garbrandt's ability to compete at a high level is currently in question.
claims.quote: I want to see if Cody is still able to to to do this at the high level

claims.claim: Miranda Maverick is a high-level opponent for Tracy Cortez.
claims.quote: she ain't no slouch.
